REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, (FC = 2 => set_val = 0.5 * ( ia + ic )) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
semantics.probabilistic_description:
SCOPE: in the interval defined by the entire execution.
TRIGGER: first point in the interval.
REQUIRED BEHAVIOR: for every trigger, with probability >=1, (FC = 2 => set_val = 0.5 * ( ia + ic )) must hold at all time points between (and including) the trigger and the end of the interval.
